5022.issue: [W5022] Why did you decide not to use i18n support?

5512.issue: [W5512] admin/jsonConfig.json5 schema validation error: Missing required property "i18n" in root

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>=3 words). Affected languages: de (1 key, example: SSH Port); ru (2 keys, examples: Private Key File, Private Key File Passphrase).

5619.issue: [S5619] "admin/jsonConfig.json5" does not specify the "i18n" attribute. It defaults to true, which may be unintentional. Please explicitly add "i18n": true, "i18n": false, or a custom path.
